sentences.target: Die Landschaft ist heute besonders schön.

translations.de: Die Landschaft ist heute besonders schön.
translations.en: The landscape is especially beautiful today.
translations.es: El paisaje está especialmente bonito hoy.
translations.fr: Le paysage est particulièrement beau aujourd'hui.
translations.it: Il paesaggio è particolarmente bello oggi.
translations.pt: A paisagem está especialmente bonita hoje.
translations.vi: Cảnh hôm nay đặc biệt đẹp.
translations.nl: Het landschap is vandaag bijzonder mooi.
translations.hi: आज का नज़ारा खास तौर पर खूबसूरत है.
translations.el: Το τοπίο είναι σήμερα ιδιαίτερα όμορφο.
translations.nb: Landskapet er spesielt vakkert i dag.
translations.id: Pemandangan hari ini luar biasa indah.
translations.ro: Peisajul este deosebit de frumos astăzi.
translations.da: Landskabet er særligt smukt i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は景色が特にきれいです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular feminine; determines the subject noun.
Feminine singular noun; grammatical subject of the clause.
Finite 3rd person singular present copula linking the subject to the predicative adjective.
Temporal adverb; sets the time frame for the clause.
Degree adverb intensifying the predicative adjective.
Predicative adjective functioning as subject complement.

sentences.target: Hier gefällt mir die Landschaft sehr.

translations.de: Hier gefällt mir die Landschaft sehr.
translations.en: I really like the landscape here.
translations.es: Me gusta mucho el paisaje de aquí.
translations.it: Mi piace molto il paesaggio qui.
translations.he: אני מאוד אוהב את הנוף כאן.
translations.vi: Tôi rất thích cảnh ở đây.
translations.nl: Ik vind het landschap hier heel mooi.
translations.hi: मुझे यहाँ का नज़ारा बहुत पसंद है.
translations.pl: Bardzo podoba mi się tutejszy krajobraz.
translations.el: Μου αρέσει πολύ το τοπίο εδώ.
translations.nb: Jeg liker landskapet her veldig godt.
translations.id: Saya sangat suka pemandangan di sini.
translations.ro: Îmi place foarte mult peisajul de aici.
translations.cs: Tady se mi krajina moc líbí.
translations.da: Jeg kan rigtig godt lide landskabet her.
translations.ja: ここの景色がとても好きです。

tokens.explanation: Locative adverb; modifies the clause by specifying place.
Finite 3rd person singular present main verb; takes a nominative subject and a dative experiencer.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular dative; indirect object/experiencer of the verb.
Definite article, nominative singular feminine; determines the subject noun.
Feminine singular noun; nominative grammatical subject of 'gefällt'.
Degree adverb; intensifies the verb ('gefällt').

sentences.target: Wir fotografieren die Landschaft am See.

translations.de: Wir fotografieren die Landschaft am See.
translations.en: We are photographing the landscape by the lake.
translations.es: Estamos tomando fotos del paisaje junto al lago.
translations.fr: Nous photographions le paysage au bord du lac.
translations.it: Stiamo fotografando il paesaggio al lago.
translations.pt: Estamos fotografando a paisagem à beira do lago.
translations.he: אנחנו מצלמים את הנוף ליד האגם.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang chụp cảnh bên hồ.
translations.ar: نحن نلتقط صورًا للمنظر عند البحيرة.
translations.nl: We fotograferen het landschap bij het meer.
translations.hi: हम झील के किनारे नज़ारे की तस्वीरें खींच रहे हैं.
translations.id: Kami memotret pemandangan di tepi danau.
translations.ja: 私たちは湖のほとりで景色を撮っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite 1st person plural present main verb; denotes the action.
Definite article, accusative singular feminine; determines the direct object noun.
Feminine singular noun; direct object of the verb.
Contracted preposition ('an' + 'dem'); introduces a locative prepositional phrase; selects dative.
Masculine singular noun; object of the preposition in dative; denotes location.

sentences.target: Die Kinder malen eine Landschaft im Heft.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈkɪndɐ ˈmaːlən ˈaɪ̯nə ˈlantʃaft ɪm hɛft/

translations.de: Die Kinder malen eine Landschaft im Heft.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈkɪndɐ ˈmaːlən ˈaɪ̯nə ˈlantʃaft ɪm hɛft/
translations.en: The children are drawing a landscape in a notebook.
translations.es: Los niños están dibujando un paisaje en el cuaderno.
translations.fr: Les enfants dessinent un paysage dans le cahier.
translations.it: I bambini stanno disegnando un paesaggio sul quaderno.
translations.zh-Hans: 孩子们在本子上画风景。
translations.yue: 啲小朋友喺簿仔度畫風景。
translations.pt: As crianças estão desenhando uma paisagem no caderno.
translations.vi: Bọn trẻ đang vẽ phong cảnh trong quyển vở.
translations.nl: De kinderen tekenen een landschap in het schrift.
translations.hu: A gyerekek tájat rajzolnak a füzetbe.
translations.hi: बच्चे कॉपी में एक नज़ारा बना रहे हैं.
translations.el: Τα παιδιά ζωγραφίζουν ένα τοπίο στο τετράδιο.
translations.nb: Barna tegner et landskap i skriveboka.
translations.id: Anak-anak menggambar pemandangan di buku tulis.
translations.sv: Barnen ritar ett landskap i häftet.
translations.ro: Copiii desenează un peisaj în caiet.
translations.da: Børnene tegner et landskab i notesbogen.
translations.ja: 子どもたちはノートに風景を描いています。
